failure_analysis: The dominant component is r_contact (event_bonus) with ratio 0.469, and repeated_event_exploitation is flagged true. The agent is likely bouncing on the pad to repeatedly trigger the contact event and collect the 20 reward multiple times, leading to high reward but poor progress and shaping mismatch. The shaping components are not dominant.
operator_reasoning: convert_to_one_time_event is valid for event_bonus components. Applying it to r_contact will ensure the contact reward is given at most once per episode, removing the incentive to bounce repeatedly and aligning the reward with a single successful landing.
diagnosis: Repeated event exploitation of the landing contact bonus. Convert to one-time event.
